items.title: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana
items.whyInNews: Recently, the Government of India has announced the completion of 3 crore houses under the Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY) scheme on 15 April 2026
items.summary: The Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY) is a flagship programme of the Government of India. The scheme aims to provide affordable housing to all by 2026. Recently, the Government of India has announced the completion of 3 crore houses under the scheme.
importantPoints: Full form: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana
Related act: The Housing for All mission
Historical context: Launched by Prime Minister Narendra Modi

items.title: India's GDP Growth Rate
items.whyInNews: According to a recent report by the World Bank, India's GDP growth rate is expected to be 7.2% in the fiscal year 2026-2027
items.summary: The World Bank has recently released a report stating that India's GDP growth rate is expected to be 7.2% in the fiscal year 2026-2027. This growth rate is higher than the global average.
importantPoints: Related act: The World Bank report
Historical context: India's GDP growth rate has been increasing over the years

items.title: G20 Summit
items.whyInNews: The G20 Summit is scheduled to be held in New Delhi, India from 9-10 September 2026
items.summary: The G20 Summit is a prestigious international event that brings together the world's leading economies to discuss global issues. The summit is scheduled to be held in New Delhi, India from 9-10 September 2026.
importantPoints: Full form: Group of Twenty
Related act: The G20 Summit is held annually
Historical context: The first G20 Summit was held in 2008

items.title: Indian Cricket Team
items.whyInNews: The Indian cricket team has won the ICC World Cup 2026, defeating Australia in the final by 5 wickets
items.summary: The Indian cricket team has made history by winning the ICC World Cup 2026. The team defeated Australia in the final by 5 wickets, with Rohit Sharma scoring a century.
importantPoints: Related act: The ICC World Cup is held every 4 years
Historical context: India has won the ICC World Cup twice before

items.title: Raghuram Rajan
items.whyInNews: Raghuram Rajan has been appointed as the Governor of the Reserve Bank of India for a second term
items.summary: Raghuram Rajan, a renowned economist, has been appointed as the Governor of the Reserve Bank of India for a second term. He will take over the position on 1 May 2026.
keyPoints: Governor of the Reserve Bank of India
importantPoints: Full form: Reserve Bank of India
Related act: The RBI is the central bank of India
Historical context: Raghuram Rajan has previously served as the Governor of the RBI

items.title: Global Innovation Index
items.whyInNews: India has ranked 40th in the Global Innovation Index 2026, released by the World Intellectual Property Organization
items.summary: The Global Innovation Index 2026 has been released by the World Intellectual Property Organization. India has ranked 40th in the index, which ranks countries based on their innovation capabilities.
keyPoints: Released by the World Intellectual Property Organization
importantPoints: Full form: Global Innovation Index
Related act: The index is released annually
Historical context: India's ranking has improved over the years

items.title: National Mission for Clean Ganga
items.whyInNews: The National Mission for Clean Ganga has launched a new initiative to clean the Ganga River, with a budget of Rs 10,000 crore
items.summary: The National Mission for Clean Ganga has launched a new initiative to clean the Ganga River. The initiative has a budget of Rs 10,000 crore and aims to make the river pollution-free by 2027.
importantPoints: Full form: National Mission for Clean Ganga
Related act: The initiative is part of the Namami Gange programme
Historical context: The Ganga River is one of the most polluted rivers in the world

items.title: India's Renewable Energy Targets
items.whyInNews: India has set a target of achieving 50% of its energy from renewable sources by 2030
items.summary: India has set a target of achieving 50% of its energy from renewable sources by 2030. This is part of the country's efforts to reduce its carbon footprint and combat climate change.
keyPoints: Part of India's efforts to combat climate change
importantPoints: Related act: The Paris Agreement
Historical context: India has been increasing its use of renewable energy over the years

items.title: RBI Monetary Policy
items.whyInNews: The Reserve Bank of India has announced a new monetary policy, with a focus on controlling inflation and promoting economic growth
items.summary: The Reserve Bank of India has announced a new monetary policy, with a focus on controlling inflation and promoting economic growth. The policy includes measures such as reducing the repo rate and increasing the cash reserve ratio.
keyPoints: Focus on controlling inflation and promoting economic growth
Measures include reducing the repo rate and increasing the cash reserve ratio
importantPoints: Full form: Reserve Bank of India
Related act: The RBI is responsible for regulating the money supply and controlling inflation
Historical context: The RBI has been taking measures to control inflation and promote economic growth

items.title: UN Climate Change Conference
items.whyInNews: The UN Climate Change Conference is scheduled to be held in Dubai, UAE from 6-17 November 2026
items.summary: The UN Climate Change Conference is a prestigious international event that brings together world leaders to discuss climate change. The conference is scheduled to be held in Dubai, UAE from 6-17 November 2026.
importantPoints: Full form: United Nations
Related act: The conference is held annually
Historical context: The conference is part of the UN's efforts to combat climate change

items.title: Indian Space Research Organisation
items.whyInNews: The Indian Space Research Organisation has successfully launched a new satellite, GSAT-32, into orbit
items.summary: The Indian Space Research Organisation has successfully launched a new satellite, GSAT-32, into orbit. The satellite will provide communication services to the country.
importantPoints: Full form: Indian Space Research Organisation
Related act: The ISRO is responsible for India's space programme
Historical context: The ISRO has been launching satellites into orbit for several years

items.title: National Education Policy
items.whyInNews: The National Education Policy has been implemented in all states and union territories, with a focus on improving the quality of education
items.summary: The National Education Policy has been implemented in all states and union territories, with a focus on improving the quality of education. The policy includes measures such as increasing the use of technology in education and promoting vocational training.
keyPoints: Implemented in all states and union territories
Focus on improving the quality of education
importantPoints: Full form: National Education Policy
Related act: The policy is part of the government's efforts to improve education

items.whyInNews: The Make in India initiative has attracted investments worth Rs 10 lakh crore, with a focus on promoting manufacturing in the country
items.summary: The Make in India initiative has attracted investments worth Rs 10 lakh crore, with a focus on promoting manufacturing in the country. The initiative includes measures such as providing incentives to investors and improving infrastructure.

importantPoints: Full form: Make in India
Related act: The initiative is part of the government's efforts to promote economic growth

items.whyInNews: The Digital India initiative has been successful in promoting digital literacy and providing online services to citizens
items.summary: The Digital India initiative has been successful in promoting digital literacy and providing online services to citizens. The initiative includes measures such as providing free Wi-Fi in public places and promoting the use of digital payments.
importantPoints: Full form: Digital India
Related act: The initiative is part of the government's efforts to promote digital governance
Historical context: The initiative was launched in 2015

items.title: Smart Cities Mission
items.whyInNews: The Smart Cities Mission has been successful in improving the infrastructure and quality of life in cities across the country
items.summary: The Smart Cities Mission has been successful in improving the infrastructure and quality of life in cities across the country. The mission includes measures such as providing clean water and sanitation, and promoting the use of renewable energy.
keyPoints: Improving infrastructure and quality of life

Related act: The mission is part of the government's efforts to promote urban development

items.summary: The Atal Innovation Mission has been successful in promoting innovation and entrepreneurship in the country. The mission includes measures such as providing funding to startups and promoting the use of technology.

items.summary: The Swachh Bharat Abhiyan has been successful in improving the cleanliness and sanitation in the country. The mission includes measures such as providing toilets and promoting the use of waste management.

items.title: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana
items.whyInNews: The Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana has been successful in promoting financial inclusion and providing banking services to the poor
items.summary: The Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana has been successful in promoting financial inclusion and providing banking services to the poor. The scheme includes measures such as providing zero-balance bank accounts and promoting the use of mobile banking.
